name: PlacingTypes
summary: The PlacingTypes class defines the different available placing types. Please note that not all objects accept all types. If you try to use the wrong type it will not be accepted (Insert, Modify will fail).

methods.name: AlongLinePlacing
methods.signature: public static PlacingBase AlongLinePlacing(Point StartPoint, Point EndPoint)
methods.summary: The object is located and moved along a line defined by two points.

params.name: StartPoint
params.doc: The first point of the line.

params.name: EndPoint
params.doc: The second point of the line.

returns.doc: A new along line placing instance.

methods.name: BaseLinePlacing
methods.signature: public static PlacingBase BaseLinePlacing(Point StartPoint, Point EndPoint)
methods.summary: The object is placed using a line as a reference. This will thus define the object's X-axis along that line.

params.name: StartPoint
params.doc: The first point of the line.

params.name: EndPoint
params.doc: The second point of the line.

returns.doc: A new base line placing instance.

methods.name: LeaderLinePlacing
methods.summary: The object is placed attached to a leader line.

params.name: LeaderLineStartPoint
params.doc: The start point of the leader line.

returns.doc: A new leader line placing instance.

methods.name: PointPlacing
methods.summary: The object is placed at one point (the insertion point) without any additional placing options.
